creator: mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com
text:
The real bug here, it seems, is that the user is asked to configure twice -- 
once for pidgin and once for libpurple. Unfortunately, no attempt is made to 
ensure, the OPTIONS are set the same.

If GSTREAMER is turned off for libpurple, as marcus@ points out, then either the 
library needs to be recompiled with it enabled, or pidgin needs to be 
reconfigured to have it disabled as well.

Yours,

    -mi
